title: Biome Houses
description:
a Datapack that inputs wonderful houses to fit each biome.
Great to put in the Vanilla and modded feel. Made with MCreator!
body:
## THIS MOD HAS BEEN ARCHIVED, NEWER BUILD HERE: https://modrinth.com/mod/biome-houses-2-fresh-beginning



# What Is Biome Houses About?

- Biome Houses adds many new starter houses to Minecraft, helping players get a home without needing to build one themselves. These houses come with all the essential resources to help you get started.

Many houses are inhabited by villagers, offering friendly roommates to keep you company. However, if that bothers you, you'll also find some pillagers—though not in overwhelming numbers. In fact, some of them might even be friendly!

- How Do I Find the Different Houses?

You’ll discover these houses naturally during your adventures. Currently, there are 8 different houses, though some biomes feature multiple house variations.

Right now, houses can be found in the following biomes:

Savanna

Desert

Plains

Snow Biomes

Taiga

Spruce Forests
-  How Do the Different Houses Look?
